omitted_declarations.policy_reference:
Analytics Information
We use data analytics software to ensure Site and App functionality and to improve the Services. For more information, see Etsy's Cookies & Similar Technologies Policy and Cookies & Similar Technologies Disclosures.
• We use third-party software to record information such as how often you use the Site and/or Apps, what happens within the Apps or on our Site (e.g., how you interact with our Services), aggregated usage, performance data, app errors and debugging information, and, in the case of Apps, where the Apps were downloaded from
